headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -21.9)
key_insights: Fears trending up 63% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 98 quotes including 71 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious grievances today.

• At 25.0, frustration levels are well above the typical range but down significantly from yesterday's peak of 56.5.

• Both fears and optimism remain subdued compared to their historical ranges, keeping the overall mood tense.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
